reviews.comment:
Agua caliente sin cargo. Servicompras completo. Baños limpios. Lugar para sentarse en la sombra.

(Translated by Google)
Free hot water. Full convenience store. Clean restrooms. Shaded seating area.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURaZ0pfeTd3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Una lastima lo mal cuidada que tienen está estación de servicio. Los baños un asco y toda la zona verde con los juegos de plaza, rotos, sucios y viejos.

(Translated by Google)
It's a shame how poorly maintained this gas station is. The bathrooms are disgusting, and the entire green area with the playground equipment is broken, dirty, and old.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNadmZyMG9nRRAB

reviews.comment:

The raw sandwich was very good and the service was very warm.

reviews.comment:
Los mejores sandwiches del planeta, y de planetas vecinos.
Está vez los probé de paso en un viaje, pero soy capaz de viajar desde Buenos Aires especialmente, para comprarlos.

(Translated by Google)
The best sandwiches on the planet, and on neighboring planets too.
This time I tried them while passing through on a trip, but I'm capable of traveling all the way from Buenos Aires just to buy them.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURwOGVpVFJnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buenos sandwich!! Buena atencion. Los baños no estan limpios pero tiene un jardin muy lindo para hacer un picnic y descansar un rato. La ruta 3 en ese trama siempre esta muy cargada.

(Translated by Google)
Great sandwiches! Good service. The bathrooms aren't clean, but it has a lovely garden for a picnic and a relaxing break. Route 3 is always very busy in that area.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwcF9HNTh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
